overall.description: First-person walk through a futuristic cyberpunk city at dusk. The camera moves along a wet waterfront promenade lined with palm trees and neon signs, passes under an elevated highway overpass, and approaches a massive tower covered in holographic advertisements. The scene features atmospheric haze, reflective wet surfaces, and dense urban neon lighting typical of Night City.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront promenade with reflective wet pavement

events.description: passing a pedestrian walking in the opposite direction
approaching blue illuminated benches and vending machines along the railing

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet waterfront sidewalk, observing the neon-lit cityscape and palm trees

notable_agents.action: walking past camera in opposite direction along the promenade

entered.detail: metal railing separating walkway from water, reflecting neon lights
tall palm trees lining the waterfront promenade
large illuminated commercial signs on building facades with pink and cyan colors
elevated highway structure with cyan neon underlighting spanning across the path ahead
blue illuminated benches along the walkway

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide waterfront promenade at dusk, with wet concrete reflecting the vibrant neon signs of the commercial district. The camera moves forward past palm trees and a pedestrian, approaching blue benches and vending machines while an elevated highway looms ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway beneath elevated highway overpass

events.description: entering covered area beneath the elevated highway overpass
passing under overpass structure, lighting shifts to artificial neon and street lamps

agents.ego_description: continuing forward under the elevated highway, passing illuminated vending machines and benches

entered.detail: massive concrete and steel elevated highway with cyan neon strip lighting underneath
illuminated red and purple vending machines with glowing screens
tall digital billboards displaying animated advertisements

segments.scene_description: The camera moves beneath the elevated highway into a semi-covered walkway. The environment shifts from open sky to an artificial neon-lit space under the overpass, with vending machines and digital kiosks lining the left side while the road continues on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection beneath overpass with crosswalk

events.description: approaching crosswalk with yellow striped markings, vehicles visible on road
slowing at intersection while observing traffic and pedestrians ahead

agents.ego_description: approaching the street crossing, navigating through the intersection beneath the overpass

notable_agents.action: car with headlights on driving under the overpass toward the intersection

entered.detail: yellow and red painted crosswalk markings on the asphalt
massive skyscraper covered in giant digital billboards and holographic advertisements
pedestrian traffic light showing red hand symbol

segments.scene_description: Emerging from under the overpass, the scene opens into a street intersection with prominent crosswalk markings. The massive tower with holographic ads dominates the right side while vehicles pass through the intersection. The camera approaches the crossing area beneath the glowing cyan edge of the overpass.

scene_state.functional_zone: vertical view of mega-corporation tower facade

events.description: camera tilts upward to focus on the towering building and sky above

agents.ego_description: stopping to look up at the towering skyscraper covered in massive holographic advertisements

entered.detail: giant floating holographic advertisements with animated faces and Japanese text
upper sections of the skyscraper extending into the dark sky with illuminated windows
small aerial vehicle hovering in the sky near the tower

segments.scene_description: The camera tilts upward to reveal the full height of the mega-tower, showcasing massive holographic billboards and animated advertisements covering the building facade. The perspective emphasizes the vertical scale of the cyberpunk architecture against the darkening sky, with a flying vehicle visible in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement from a wide, reflective waterfront promenade into the dense, vertical heart of a neon-lit cyberpunk district. It begins by gliding past palm trees and blue benches on wet concrete that mirrors the vibrant commercial signs, moving steadily toward a looming elevated highway. As the camera passes beneath the overpass, the open dusk sky is replaced by a semi-covered walkway lined with glowing digital kiosks and vending machines. The scene then opens into a busy street intersection with prominent crosswalks, where the camera emerges from the cyan glow of the overpass to face a massive tower. Finally, the perspective tilts upward to reveal the staggering height of the mega-tower, showcasing animated holographic billboards that stretch toward the darkening sky as a flying vehicle drifts in the distance.
